policy: Stage-local PASS requires deterministic synthetic recovery, exact-message M3, Timeline and schedule boundaries plus explicit CONTROLLED_NOT_RUN status for every protected production assertion.

resolutions.finding: A successful upload response alone cannot prove that Raw and Processed are remotely recoverable.
resolutions.resolution: The recovery gate refetches every required ciphertext, verifies its exact digest, decrypts with official age in memory and binds every plaintext digest before authorizing M3.

resolutions.finding: Processed output may be legitimately unavailable or deferred and must not be guessed complete.
resolutions.resolution: COMPLETE requires the full Processed plan; WAITING, UNSUPPORTED and RAW_ONLY are explicit safe-deferred outcomes, while QUARANTINED always denies recovery authorization.

resolutions.finding: Gmail mutation has destructive collateral risk if message identity or recovery state changes between discovery and Trash.
resolutions.resolution: M3 performs a deterministic second verification, binds the exact recovery proof and source ID, applies a phase budget, calls only users.messages.trash and confirms the TRASH label; uncertain responses are not retried blindly.

resolutions.finding: Timeline time, label and market expectations can be misleading across Sydney and US exchange boundaries.
resolutions.resolution: internalDate remains UTC truth, Sydney is explicit display context, XNYS session lag is calendar-backed, and MISSING requires independent expectation evidence plus an elapsed SLA.

resolutions.finding: PNG output can drift with input order, fonts, metadata, compression or runtime defaults.
resolutions.resolution: The renderer fixes dimensions, order, palette, default bundled font, compression and metadata and renders only to memory; semantic snapshot identity suppresses unchanged redraws.

resolutions.finding: GitHub Release assets reject duplicate names and delete-then-upload can temporarily leave no live asset.
resolutions.resolution: The publisher targets one fixed tag/name, verifies existing ciphertext, serializes delete then upload, persists encrypted repair state after failure and replays older repair work before accepting newer snapshots.

resolutions.finding: Scheduled workflow execution can be delayed and a UTC-only cron cannot preserve 04:30 Sydney through DST.
resolutions.resolution: The workflow uses timezone Australia/Sydney with cron 30 4 * * *, retains workflow_dispatch, makes Sunday/manual runs full reconcile and represents delayed/catch-up state without claiming punctual execution.

resolutions.finding: Real recovery, Gmail Trash, live Release replacement and scheduled execution need protected credentials and remote authority.
resolutions.resolution: All production adapters and workflow execution remain uncalled, the protected workflow is feature-gated, every production oracle is NOT_RUN and all real-call counters remain zero.

resolutions.finding: Stage 6 canary observation, alerting, deployment acceptance and later-stage review are outside this run.
resolutions.resolution: No Stage 6 implementation or acceptance claim is introduced; Stage 5 hands off a local-only contract for the next run.
